inputs.label: Static Water Level
inputs.businessContext: Depth from ground surface to water level when not pumping.

businessContext_i18n.en: Depth from ground surface to water level when not pumping.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pompalama yapılmadığında zemin yüzeyinden su seviyesine kadar olan derinlik.
businessContext_i18n.de: Tiefe von der Geländeoberkante bis zum Wasserstand bei Nichtförderung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Profondeur depuis la surface du sol jusqu'au niveau d'eau sans pompage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad desde la superficie del suelo hasta el nivel del agua cuando no se bombea.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العمق من سطح الأرض إلى مستوى الماء عند عدم الضخ.

inputs.label: Drawdown
inputs.businessContext: Additional drop in water level during pumping.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional drop in water level during pumping.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pompalama sırasında su seviyesindeki ek düşüş.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Abfall des Wasserstands während des Pumpens.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Baisse supplémentaire du niveau d'eau pendant le pompage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caída adicional del nivel del agua durante el bombeo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: انخفاض إضافي في مستوى الماء أثناء الضخ.

inputs.label: Discharge Head
inputs.businessContext: Pressure head required at discharge point (1 bar ≈ 10.2 m).

businessContext_i18n.en: Pressure head required at discharge point (1 bar ≈ 10.2 m).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deşarj noktasında gereken basınç yüksekliği (1 bar ≈ 10.2 m).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erforderlicher Druck am Austrittspunkt (1 bar ≈ 10,2 m).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur de pression requise au point de refoulement (1 bar ≈ 10,2 m).
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura de presión requerida en el punto de descarga (1 bar ≈ 10,2 m).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الضغط المطلوب عند نقطة التفريغ (1 بار ≈ 10.2 متر).

inputs.label: Friction Loss
inputs.businessContext: Estimated friction loss in piping and fittings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated friction loss in piping and fittings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boru ve bağlantı elemanlarında tahmini sürtünme kaybı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Reibungsverlust in Rohrleitungen und Formstücken.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Perte de charge estimée dans les canalisations et raccords.
businessContext_i18n.es: Pérdida estimada por fricción en tuberías y accesorios.
businessContext_i18n.ar: فقد الاحتكاك المقدر في الأنابيب والتوصيلات.
